description: This column contains the names of the feeds or posts in a social media platform or messaging app. Each row in this column would likely represent a specific feed or post created by a user on the platform.

examples: Limited Time Offer: 50% Off All Items
Don't Miss Out: Summer Sale Starts Now
Stay Connected with Our Latest Updates
Join Us for Our Annual Charity Gala
Unlock Special Rewards with Our Loyalty Program
Get Ready for Our Grand Opening Celebration
Your Opinion Matters: Take Our Survey
Prepare for the Ultimate Shopping Experience
description: This column is about storing the title of notifications that are intended for public display.

examples: New profile picture uploaded. Check it out!
Your friend has tagged you in a post.
Don't miss our latest promotion on all items!
Reminder: Today is the last day for the contest entry.
Join the live Q&A session with our CEO tomorrow.
Your post has been trending for the past week.
Exciting news! We are launching a new feature soon.
Happy birthday! Enjoy a 20% discount on your special day.
Important update: Terms of Service have been updated.
Get ready for the weekend with our exclusive playlist.
Thank you for being a loyal member of our community.
Check out the latest blog post for tips and tricks.
You have been mentioned as a top influencer in our platform.
Hurry! Limited-time offer on premium subscriptions.
Join us in celebrating International Women's Day.
Share your thoughts on the latest product release.
Your friend has invited you to join a group chat.
Rewards alert! Refer a friend and get exclusive benefits.
Stay connected with our weekly newsletters for updates.
description: This column is about storing the body content of notifications that are intended to be displayed publicly within the social media platform or messaging app.
This column is about storing the names of users who have accounts on the social media platform or messaging app.
This column contains the unique login IDs of users on the social media platform or messaging app.
This column is about storing the email addresses of users who have accounts on the social media platform or messaging app.
